creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Wen Heping from comment #11)
Hi Loïc, hi Wen,

I also would vote for an option to download (all) DATUM_GRID_FILES.

pkg_message could explain, that instead their is also a way to manually download only parts of DATUM_GRID_FILES by using projsync.

ATM, I am testing proj-7.1.1 with graphics/saga and graphics/qgis. This will take a moment. I will report back.

And MANY thanks for the newest patch, Loïc :)
